query_title: Detective Conan: The Time Bombed Skyscraper

recommendations.title: Detective Conan: Crossroad in the Ancient Capital
recommendations.overview: Mouri Kogoro is called to a special case in the ancient capital of Kyoto. There, Conan meets Heiji and they team up once again to solve the case, recover the stolen Healing Buddha statue, and even discover the identity of Heiji's first love.

recommendations.title: Case Closed: Countdown to Heaven
recommendations.overview: As a pair of towers in Tokyo are being prepared for their grand opening, there is a series of murders of people connected to the towers. Conan suspects that the mysterious Syndicate may also be involved.

recommendations.title: Detective Conan: Captured in Her Eyes

recommendations.title: Case Closed: The Fourteenth Target
recommendations.overview: Ran’s secret past revealed! Ten years ago, something happened between her mom and dad. Now, plagued by nightmares, Ran is starting to remember… Meanwhile, a murderous card dealer breaks out of jail to seek revenge. His target: Ran’s father. Can Conan

recommendations.title: Detective Conan: The Last Wizard of the Century
recommendations.overview: Kaitou Kid dares to challenge the police once more, setting his sights on the Russian Imperial Easter Egg. With the date, time, and place, the Osaka police force scrambles to stop him. But this time, Kid may have bitten off more than he can chew—Cona

recommendations.title: Detective Conan: The Phantom of Baker Street
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Mystery, Science Fiction, Crime

recommendations.title: Code Geass: Lelouch of the Re;surrection
recommendations.genres: Animation, Science Fiction, Crime, Mystery, War
recommendations.overview: The story takes place several years after Lelouch's "Zero Requiem" plan. He gave up his life to save the world and protect the ones he loved. The day Lelouch vi Brittannia fell was the day this war-torn world found peace. Now, as his friends work to

recommendations.title: The Maltese Falcon
recommendations.overview: A private detective takes on a case that involves him with three eccentric criminals, a beautiful liar, and their quest for a priceless statuette.

recommendations.title: New Gods: Nezha Reborn
recommendations.overview: While living as an ordinary deliveryman and motor racing fan, Nezha encounters old nemeses and must rediscover his powers to protect his loved ones.

recommendations.title: Sherlock Holmes
recommendations.overview: Eccentric consulting detective Sherlock Holmes and Doctor John Watson battle to bring down a new nemesis and unravel a deadly plot that could destroy England.
